description: A photograph captures a clear, fast-flowing forest stream. The stream bed is filled with numerous rocks and boulders, most of which are densely covered in vibrant green moss. The water appears smooth and blurred due to a long-exposure photographic technique, conveying a sense of motion. Both banks of the stream are lined with dense, lush green trees, creating a forest canopy overhead. Sunlight filters through the leaves, illuminating parts of the forest floor and rocks. The image depicts a natural, untouched riparian zone, likely in spring or summer.
